title: Conferences: On the Goal of the Monk
description: The Egyptian monk Abba Moses teaches: the immediate goal is purity of heart; the ultimate goal is the kingdom of heaven.
introduction: The Egyptian monk Abba Moses teaches: the immediate goal is purity of heart; the ultimate goal is the kingdom of heaven.

translation.text: The end of our profession is the kingdom of God. But the immediate aim is purity of heart, without which it is impossible to reach that end.
